summary: Added a custom Payout Vault minigame for submitted bounty payout monitoring with a generated revenue-vault texture, five data-derived payout stations, responsive board styling, and local-only safety language.

queries: bounty payout status dashboard payment evidence owner selection workflow UI
GitHub bounty payout monitor owner selected solver payment request dashboard
accounts payable payment approval dashboard status timeline UI
payment approval workflow status dashboard approval evidence source
pattern_notes: The game separates submitted work, owner or maintainer signal, payment evidence, collision or attribution risk, and payment-detail approval gates.
The interface stays in monitor-only language when owner selection or explicit payout evidence is not present.
Payment detail, wallet, account, bank, invoice, tax, and public-response actions remain visually locked until explicit owner approval.

constraints: no readable bank, wallet, or card details

checks.result: Passed with Monitor Only verdict, texture loaded, 5 stages, 5 locks, no board overflow, no console errors, and next control moving focus from Submitted Work to Owner Signal.
Passed with texture loaded, 5 stages, 5 locks, no board overflow, and no console errors in the narrow docked detail panel.
Passed with texture loaded, 5 stages in a full-width row, 5 locks, no board overflow, and no console errors.
